song.title: Hallelujah To My King_F
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B V3 C
song.lyrics: .Capo 1 Intro: Dm - A# - A# - F [v1] . Dm C 1) Oh how strong the power of Jesus’ name . A#2 F C It is stronger than any other name . Dm C How sweet the victory that bore my shame . A#2 F C Took the burden of my sin away [c] Chorus . F A#2 Hallelujah, what a Savior . F C I owe everything to Him. . Dm A#2 Hallelujah, what a Savior . F Csus Dm A# F Hallelujah to my King. . (F) [v2] . Dm C 2) Oh how great the kindness our God has shown . A#2 F C We were strangers, Now we’re called His own . Dm C His grace has welcomed The sinner home . A#2 F C Tender mercies lead us to the throne [b] Bridge . Dm A# Dm A# Hallelujah! Hallelujah to my King! [v3] . Dm C 3) Oh what peace the Spirit of Jesus brings . A#2 F C Through the trials He will carry me . Dm C One day, in glory, our eyes will meet . A#2 F C Filled with wonder, all the saints will sing.
